thought: Blend the scraped gameplay motion into the locked first frame by treating @0045.jpg as an exact mid-battle continuation, not a restart. I keep the horizontal side-view combat layout, top UI anchor, center-left damage read zone, and left-to-right attack flow unchanged. Following the reference video rhythm, the sequence uses a compressed 6-second structure: resolve the existing floating damage first, then a short anticipation, then an ultimate-like burst with fixed-camera impact, brief hit stop, large critical numbers, shield or recoil feedback, and a fast return to battle state. To stay faithful to Xundao Daqian, the visuals remain Chinese ink wash, cutout-animation-like, with exaggerated ink-gold VFX rather than realistic 3D motion. I selected only essential assets under the limit: the first frame lock, one hero ultimate sheet, one spirit beast support sheet, one enemy hit reaction sheet, one ultimate VFX pack, one battle UI FX pack, one floating combat text UI, plus the motion reference video. This preserves character consistency, uses the external video for timing and combat cadence, and applies slow-but-snappy 2D action with strong numerical feedback, stable anatomy, and no composition drift.
prompt_en: First Frame: @0045.jpg. Reference Video: @trimmed_best_ref_1774784731.mp4. Motion Style Reference: use the exact timing logic of a mobile battle demo with fixed camera, short anticipation, instant burst, hit stop, large critical damage numbers, shield ripple or recoil feedback, and rapid return to the same battle state; preserve the original side-on 2D battle view, the top UI anchor, the left-team to right-enemy layout, and continue directly from the current mid-battle round 4 moment. [00s-01s] (Background Layer) Keep the misty ink-wash mountain battlefield and faded divine-tree atmosphere unchanged, minimal parallax only, Chinese ink wash painting style, traditional oriental aesthetics, flat illustration, cutout animation vibe, muted jade-cyan and ink-black palette with small golden accents. (Character/Action Layer) Start with @0045.jpg as the first frame to lock composition and character consistency; the currently struck allied unit finishes a brief hit reaction in place without changing side positions, while the next acting left-side hero from @hero_ultimate_sprite_sheet_194701.png gains a subtle ready pose and edge glow. (VFX Layer) Very light residual impact shimmer near the center line, preparing the next action. (UI Layer) Resolve the existing floating negative damage text using @floating_combat_text_ui_190132.png, letting it drift upward and fade, then update the relevant HP bar and status icons with @battle_ui_fx_pack_194949.png. [01s-02s] (Background Layer) Camera remains fixed like the reference gameplay, no cinematic push-in, only a tiny screen-tightening emphasis through contrast and flash. (Character/Action Layer) The left hero performs a compact ultimate wind-up from @hero_ultimate_sprite_sheet_194701.png, a snappy but readable half-step forward and weapon lift; the spirit beast from @spirit_beast_support_sheet_194742.png appears just behind and above the hero’s left-rear side, hovering in support. (VFX Layer) Ink-gold energy gathers around the weapon and spirit beast using @ultimate_vfx_pack_194914.png, forming brushstroke arcs and circular talisman-like ripples. (UI Layer) A soft acting-unit highlight and skill-trigger pulse appears above the attacker with @battle_ui_fx_pack_194949.png. [02s-03s] (Background Layer) Same locked battlefield composition, enemy group stays on the right. (Character/Action Layer) Follow the rhythm of @trimmed_best_ref_1774784731.mp4: the hero releases the ultimate across the center line in one decisive left-to-right strike, with limited body displacement and strong silhouette readability; the spirit beast support aligns to the hit timing instead of separate overlong motion. (VFX Layer) A bold ink slash and gold burst from @ultimate_vfx_pack_194914.png crosses the middle of the screen, then detonates on the enemy center mass; add a sharp flash, expanding shockwave ring, particle dissipation, and a short hit-stop frame. (UI Layer) Large critical damage numbers and a bold combat text burst pop near center-right using @floating_combat_text_ui_190132.png and @battle_ui_fx_pack_194949.png, synced tightly to the impact beat. [03s-04s] (Background Layer) Keep fixed game-camera language from the reference video, only a micro screen shake on impact. (Character/Action Layer) The enemy on the right from @enemy_hit_reaction_sheet_194829.png recoils with head and torso snapping back slightly, feet staying within its lane, showing RPG-style stagger rather than full knockback; allied units on the left remain anchored. (VFX Layer) Add a defensive ripple or shield-like energy wrap at the impact point, then crack through it with gold-black ink fragments and sparks using @ultimate_vfx_pack_194914.png. (UI Layer) Enemy HP drops visibly, status icons flicker, and a secondary smaller damage tick appears slightly above the main number with @battle_ui_fx_pack_194949.png. [04s-05s] (Background Layer) The misty background settles immediately after the burst, preserving readability and original anchors. (Character/Action Layer) The hero eases back into the battle stance from @hero_ultimate_sprite_sheet_194701.png, while the spirit beast fades to a support hover from @spirit_beast_support_sheet_194742.png; the enemy completes the recoil loop from @enemy_hit_reaction_sheet_194829.png but remains alive to match the ongoing round logic. (VFX Layer) Remaining ink-gold trails curl outward and dissipate, leaving a faint afterglow at the strike path. (UI Layer) Critical numbers finish their upward float and dissolve; HP bars and turn-state UI stabilize using @battle_ui_fx_pack_194949.png. [05s-06s] (Background Layer) No scene transition, no victory screen, maintain the same combat field and side-view layout. (Character/Action Layer) All units return to idle-ready poses, clearly setting up the next turn in the same round flow. (VFX Layer) Residual particles vanish, no full-screen ultimate overlay. (UI Layer) Keep the top round indicator and battle HUD readable, with one last subtle status shimmer to show the battle continues. Overall visual direction: Chinese ink wash fantasy battle UI, side-on 2D battle view with slight elevated perspective, one clear ultimate action only, strong left-to-right combat flow, sharp focus, 4K ultra HD, cinematic texture, rich details, stable face without deformation, clear facial features, normal anatomical structure, natural proportions, non-stiff movement, no jitter.
prompt_zh: > 首帧锁定: @0045.jpg。参考视频: @trimmed_best_ref_1774784731.mp4。动作风格参考: 采用手游实机战斗演示的节奏结构——固定镜头、短前摇、瞬时爆发、命中停顿、大号暴击飘字、护盾波纹或受击反馈、随后快速回到同一战斗状态；严格保持原首帧的横版战斗构图、顶部UI锚点、左侧我方右侧敌方站位，并且从当前第4回合进行中的战斗瞬间继续，不要重开场景。 [00s-01s]（背景层）保持水墨山雾战场与淡化神树氛围不变，只做极轻微视差，整体为中国水墨风、东方传统审美、平面插画、剪纸/皮影式动感，配色以墨黑、米白、青玉灰、少量金色点缀为主。（角色/动作层）以@0045.jpg作为绝对首帧锁定构图和角色一致性；当前刚受击的左侧单位原地完成一个短促受击收势，不改变阵型位置；下一位即将行动的左侧主角调用@hero_ultimate_sprite_sheet_194701.png，出现轻微蓄力准备姿态和轮廓发光。（特效层）画面中央仅保留上一击残余的轻微能量闪烁，为下一段动作做承接。（UI层）先明确处理当前已出现的负数飘字，调用@floating_combat_text_ui_190132.png让其向上漂浮并淡出，再用@battle_ui_fx_pack_194949.png同步更新对应血条和状态图标。 [01s-02s]（背景层）镜头保持和参考视频一致的固定实机视角，不做电影式推进，只通过轻微亮度压缩与局部闪光增强紧张感。（角色/动作层）左侧主角依据@hero_ultimate_sprite_sheet_194701.png做一个紧凑的大招前摇：半步前探、抬手提势、动作干脆利落但清晰可读；灵兽依据@spirit_beast_support_sheet_194742.png在主角左后上方短暂浮现进行协同。（特效层）使用@ultimate_vfx_pack_194914.png在武器和灵兽周围聚拢墨金能量，形成笔触弧线、环形符纹、蓄力波纹。（UI层）用@battle_ui_fx_pack_194949.png给行动单位加一个低调高亮和技能触发提示。 [02s-03s]（背景层）战场构图完全锁定，敌方群体仍停留在右侧区域。（角色/动作层）严格吸收@trimmed_best_ref_1774784731.mp4的节奏：主角释放一次横向贯穿中央的大招攻击，身体位移很小，重点突出轮廓和出招时机；灵兽协同命中，不做冗长分离动作。（特效层）调用@ultimate_vfx_pack_194914.png在屏幕中央扫出一道浓重墨色刀光并叠加金色爆闪，沿左到右穿过中心后在敌方身上炸开；加入冲击波圆环、粒子飞散、短促命中停顿和强烈暴击闪帧。（UI层）用@floating_combat_text_ui_190132.png与@battle_ui_fx_pack_194949.png在中心偏右位置打出巨大暴击伤害数字和醒目的战斗飘字，和命中瞬间严格同步。 [03s-04s]（背景层）继续保持参考视频那种固定游戏镜头，只在命中瞬间做非常轻微的震屏。（角色/动作层）敌方调用@enemy_hit_reaction_sheet_194829.png完成RPG式受击反馈：上半身后仰、头部猛抬、原地踉跄，但不夸张击飞，不离开原本站位；我方其他单位保持锚定不乱跑。（特效层）在命中点叠加一个护盾波纹/能量罩反馈，随后被墨金碎裂效果冲破，伴随黑金碎片和火花，用@ultimate_vfx_pack_194914.png表现。（UI层）敌方血条明显下降，状态图标闪烁，并用@battle_ui_fx_pack_194949.png追加一个较小的二段伤害或状态飘字。 [04s-05s]（背景层）爆发结束后，远景山雾迅速稳定，继续保持首帧锚点和可读性。（角色/动作层）主角依据@hero_ultimate_sprite_sheet_194701.png收招回到战斗待机，灵兽依据@spirit_beast_support_sheet_194742.png回落为伴随悬浮状态；敌方依据@enemy_hit_reaction_sheet_194829.png完成受击回弹但仍然存活，以符合当前回合仍在继续的逻辑。（特效层）残留墨金轨迹向外卷散并逐步消失，只留下很淡的攻击余辉。（UI层）暴击数字继续上浮后消散，血条与回合UI稳定归位，继续用@battle_ui_fx_pack_194949.png维持战斗反馈。 [05s-06s]（背景层）不切胜利结算，不转场，保持同一横版战场和侧视布局。（角色/动作层）所有单位回到待机备战姿态，清楚地为下一单位出手做铺垫。（特效层）残余粒子完全消散，不出现全屏大招转场。（UI层）顶部回合信息和战斗HUD保持清晰，仅保留一次轻微状态闪烁，强调战斗仍在继续。整体要求：严格中国水墨幻想战斗UI风格，侧视2D战斗并带轻微俯视感，只表现一个核心大招动作，强化从左到右的攻击流向，画面锐利清晰，4K超清，电影级纹理，细节丰富，面部稳定不变形，五官清楚，结构正常，比例自然，动作不僵硬，无抖动。
